subject: Psyduck, a yellow duck-like Pokemon with its hands pressed to its head in evident distress, standing in a tiled indoor setting
description: Psyduck stands in the center-left of the frame, rendered in soft yellow with a cream-beige bill and flat expression. Both stubby arms are raised and pressed against the sides of its head — the signature distress pose tied to its perpetual headache lore. The setting appears to be a tiled indoor space, possibly a bathroom or corridor, with blue-grey tones in the background suggesting cool indoor lighting. The composition gives a sense of cramped or enclosed space. The figure faces mostly forward with a dazed, overwhelmed expression.
foreground: Psyduck with hands pressed to head
emotion: distressed, dazed — hands pressed to head, flat unfocused expression
